text:
=F7 =D0=CE, 04/09/2006 =D7 10:22 -0400, michael johnson =D0=C9=DB=C5=D4:

> Change the following line in gqview and see if it works for you=20
>=20
> -  LDFLAGS=3D"-L${LOCALBASE}/lib"
> +LDFLAGS=3D"-L${LOCALBASE}/lib ${PTHREAD_LIBS}"

It helps, Thank you.
